content.en:
Airplanes!

The space-time ancestral order was opened, forming a space-time channel.

A copy of Ye Tian's body immediately entered the space-time channel, and soon came to the space-time ancestral realm.

......

"This is the Space-Time Ancestral Realm, it's very far away, too far away from the Eternal Ruins!"

Ye Tian by copying the perception between the body, Dao.

The suppression of the Space-Time Ancestral Realm is very powerful, even if an ordinary half-step perfect controller of the Extreme Creation Realm comes here, he will definitely endure extremely terrifying suppression, and it is difficult to exert his strength.

Moreover, this repression is somewhat familiar.

"The power of the super-perfect treasure is suppressed!"

Ye Tian was shocked.

And there is obviously no super-perfect treasure around, but the entire space-time ancestral realm has the suppression of super-perfect exotic treasures.

"Could it be that the Space-Time Ancestral Realm is a super-perfect treasure?" Ye Tian doubted: "No, the space-time ancestral realm is not very much like a super-perfect treasure, but more like a special world that has been integrated into the super-perfect treasure. "

Ye Tian didn't think too much about it, and soon followed a kind of traction and came to an incomparably huge space-time ancestral city.

After entering the Time and Space Ancestral City, Ye Tian knew that this was the only giant city in the Time and Space Ancestral Realm.

As soon as he entered here, Ye Tian sensed a large number of powerhouses.

"Perfect-level Ancestral Fu!"

"Perfect-level Ancestral Fu!"

"Perfect-level Ancestral Fu!"

Ye Tian sensed a lot of perfect-level ancestral endowments, maybe a single powerhouse only contained one kind of perfect-level ancestral endowment, but there were many strong people here, so there were a lot of perfect-level ancestral endowments.

"It's all copied!"

In an instant, these perfect-level ancestral endowments were copied by Ye Tian, and they could all be fused into his own perfect-level ancestral endowments in the future.

"There are a lot of perfect controllers here, and there are even super perfect controllers!"

Ye Tian muttered.

He used his copying talent to carefully perceive it, most of the perfect controllers here are high-level perfect controllers, and there are only a very few medium-level perfect controllers, it seems that the background is not ordinary, otherwise he would not be able to enter here.

As for the half-step perfect controller of the Extreme Creation Realm, there are also some, but there are very few.

"I wonder if the Lord of Time is here?"

Ye Tian was curious.

Thereupon.

Ye Tian contacted the Lord of Time at the Wudao Tower and inquired.

"Ye Tian, I didn't expect the Lord of the Ancient to let you go to the Space-Time Ancestral Realm, it is indeed very good, I have also been there, but now I am not there, I have been there for 100 million eternal years, and there is no way to enter again. You can stay in it for a while and come out, time can be accumulated, there is no need to stay for 100 million eternal years at once. "The Lord of Time.

"Thank you Lord of Time for the reminder. "

Ye Tian said.

"By the way, the Wudao Pagoda also has a half-step perfect controller of the Extreme Creation Realm in the Space-Time Ancestral Realm, you can contact him. The Lord of Time said.

"Oh, who is it?"

Ye Tian was a little surprised.

"It's the girl of Yueli, a descendant of the Lord of the Ancients, although there have been countless generations, her talents and qualifications are very high, and the Lord of the Ancient Ages also attaches great importance to her. She is now in the Space-Time Ancestral Realm, and it seems that she has also mastered the prototype of the Space-Time Extreme Dao now, you can go to her. But this girl's personality is a little cold. "The Lord of Time.

"Yueli is in control, I know!"

Ye Tiandao.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian obtained the contact information of the person in charge of the moon glass and contacted her.

Soon, Ye Tian got in touch with the Moon Glass Master, and knew the Moon Glass Master's residence in the Time and Space Ancestral City, and immediately went over.

After a while, Ye Tian met this moon glass controller.

"I've seen the Moonglass Master!"

Ye Tian greeted very politely.

"Endless Controller Ye Tian, I've heard of you!" "For the sake of being a member of the Infinite Dao Tower, I can introduce you to some of the situation in the Space-Time Ancestral Realm, but it can only be like this, and I can't give you extra help." "

"First of all, in the Space-Time Ancestral Realm, there is a currency, which is the Extreme Dao Coin!"

As he spoke, the Yueli controller took out an Extreme Dao Coin: "This is the Time Extreme Dao Coin, the Extreme Dao Coin is a kind of Extreme Dao Coin that is made up of those strong people who have comprehended the power of the Extreme Dao, who connect the Extreme Dao power in the Ancestral Realm of Time and Space, compress the Extreme Dao power, and finally condense it." For example, the Time Pole Dao Coin can not only be used as currency, but also help cultivators quickly comprehend the power of the Extreme Dao, if there are enough Extreme Dao Coins, the time to comprehend the power of the Extreme Dao will be reduced by many times. Of course, Pole Coins are so precious and not cheap. Even if you comprehend the power of the Extreme Dao, it will take a long time to make the Extreme Dao Coin by yourself, and basically, the time for a Extreme Dao Coin to be made is 100,000 eternal years. And the time that a perfect controller has been in the space-time ancestral realm is 100 million eternal years, which means that no matter who it is, he can only make a thousand Extreme Dao coins in the space-time ancestral realm at most. Of course, if the main body and the will clone are created together, you can create 2,000 Extreme Dao Coins, but in that case, there will be no time for cultivation. Therefore, those strong people who have comprehended the power of the Extreme Dao use their will clones to create Extreme Dao coins and practice on their own bodies, so as not to delay their cultivation. "

"The Extreme Dao Token can only stay in the Space-Time Ancestral Realm, because this is the condensation and compression of the Extreme Dao power of the Space-Time Ancestral Realm, and it cannot be taken out. If you want to get Arctic Coins, you can exchange them for some precious treasures, such as Perfect Treasures, or other treasures. In short, it is very difficult to get Extreme Coins. There are many places in the Space-Time Ancestral Realm that can assist in the power of the Extreme Dao, but the best place is the Extreme Dao Mountain. "

"Extreme Dao Mountain is the closest place to the origin of the Extreme Dao in the Ancestral Realm of Time and Space, and the effect of enlightenment there is many times that of other places, but the Extreme Dao Mountain is very difficult to enter, and without comprehending the power of the Extreme Dao, it is impossible to enter the Extreme Dao Mountain at all. In addition, the Jidao coin is also condensed in Jidao Mountain. As for what exactly is inside Mt. Gokudo, I don't know because I haven't been there either. "

The moon glass controller said a lot, giving Ye Tian a general understanding of the situation.

"Thank you for the introduction of the moon glass master. "

Ye Tian thanked.

"It's nothing, if it's okay, the Infinite Master should leave, I still have to practice!" said the Moon Glass Master.

"Good!"

Ye Tian took his leave.

After leaving, Ye Tian smiled slightly: "Sure enough, as the Lord of Time said, this Moon Glass Controller has a cold personality and has almost been practicing in retreat, no wonder I have joined the Wudao Pagoda for so long, and I have also participated in the gathering of the half-step perfect controller of the Extreme Realm many times, but I have never seen her once." "

"Let's go to Mt. Extreme Road first!"

Ye Tian decided.

After all, he has comprehended the Extreme Dao of the Sword and can enter the Extreme Dao Mountain, and he is ready to condense and compress the Extreme Dao Coins of the Sword in the Extreme Dao Mountain, and then exchange the Extreme Dao Coins of the Sword for the items he needs.
